name: External MCP profile access
identity_and_policy: Gateway OAuth access token bound to profile and protected resource; per-method and target-aware policy
data: Tools, resources, templates, prompts, completions, tasks, subscriptions, notifications, structured content
availability_and_recovery: Gateway replicas are stateless over durable control and runtime state

name: Browser console access
identity_and_policy: Encrypted HttpOnly SameSite session plus CSRF on unsafe requests
data: Installation projections, task controls, artifact workflows, domain administration
availability_and_recovery: Browser never receives gateway bearer; BFF replicas use encrypted cookie state

name: Console static application
identity_and_policy: CSP, frame denial, MIME sniff prevention, and same-origin referrer policy
data: React application assets
availability_and_recovery: Immutable build assets

name: Console to gateway administration
protocol_or_contract: HTTPS; gateway administration and artifact routes
identity_and_policy: BFF-held OAuth token; gateway policy and audit
data: Safe installation projection and explicit mutations
availability_and_recovery: BFF refresh rotation uses durable gateway token family state

name: Enterprise identity federation
identity_and_policy: Issuer, key, claim, tenant, client, scope, and protected-resource validation
data: Authorization requests, tokens, claims, public keys
availability_and_recovery: Unknown issuers or keys fail closed

name: Gateway OAuth service
protocol_or_contract: OAuth authorization code with PKCE; client credentials; client assertions; ID-JAG
identity_and_policy: Authorization server policy; rotating refresh families; replay detection
data: Authorization codes, access tokens, refresh tokens, metadata
availability_and_recovery: Durable compare-and-swap rotation and bounded duplicate delivery

name: Gateway hosted-server MCP
identity_and_policy: Short-lived Ed25519 internal assertion with audience, principal, tenant, labels, and scopes
data: Canonical server MCP requests and responses
availability_and_recovery: Gateway reconnects per request/session; server state is durable where required

name: Gateway hosted-server administration
protocol_or_contract: Private HTTP under canonical server admin mount
identity_and_policy: AdminRead or AdminWrite policy, audit, and short-lived internal assertion
data: Bounded administrative request and response models
availability_and_recovery: Owning server uses the same domain state as its MCP surface

name: Platform persistence
identity_and_policy: Dedicated runtime credentials; tenant-scoped persistence APIs
data: Identity, policy, control, tasks, artifacts, recordings, agents, audit, outbox
availability_and_recovery: Transactional outbox is authoritative; LIVE is a latency path only

name: Installation bootstrap
identity_and_policy: Separate bootstrap credentials
data: Ordered migrations, runtime user rotation, initial control revision
availability_and_recovery: Runs to completion before long-lived services

name: Task protocol projection
protocol_or_contract: MCP final task extension and SSE
identity_and_policy: Same principal and policy context as tool invocation
data: Task create, get, update, cancel, list, notifications, progress, result
availability_and_recovery: Projects the shared task runtime without a second task store

name: Task persistence
identity_and_policy: Task owner includes tenant, principal, profile, server, and operation
data: Tasks, leases, inputs, results, provider jobs, retention pins
availability_and_recovery: Resume

name: Domain artifact operations
protocol_or_contract: Private HTTP through artifact client or Python SDK
identity_and_policy: Forwarded internal identity or task-bound write capability
data: Metadata, capabilities, uploads, downloads, grants, releases, share links
availability_and_recovery: Idempotent capability redemption and durable artifact records

name: Artifact byte storage
identity_and_policy: Installation object-store credentials; service-only access
data: Artifact blob bytes and short-lived signed download redirects
availability_and_recovery: Tenant-derived storage keys and content integrity hashes

name: Authorized artifact download
identity_and_policy: Gateway policy and audit; service-side authorization
data: Short-lived object-store redirect
availability_and_recovery: No domain-specific byte route

name: Public artifact redemption
identity_and_policy: Random read-only bearer; hash-only storage; expiry, limit, release state, revocation
data: Artifact download redirect
availability_and_recovery: Edge logging suppresses bearer path

name: Recording ingest
identity_and_policy: Installation-private boundary and configured recording owner
data: Rerun log messages and bounded replay
availability_and_recovery: Push-only ingest; fsynced crash-decodable segment rotation

name: Recording query
protocol_or_contract: Read-only RRD files plus SurrealDB catalog
identity_and_policy: Tenant and data-label authorization before physical segment resolution
data: Logical recording metadata, chunks, timelines, and components
availability_and_recovery: Logical recordings may span restart siblings

name: Perception source read
protocol_or_contract: Read-only RRD files or explicitly bounded recent proxy
identity_and_policy: Canonical recording URI authorization; classification and labels propagate
data: H.264 VideoStream samples, timestamps, keyframes
availability_and_recovery: Durable reads use frozen or sealed segments; recent proxy is interrupted-indeterminate

name: Perception runner
identity_and_policy: Site-approved mounted configuration and task-level filesystem boundary
data: Runner request, detections, tracks, source indices
availability_and_recovery: One process per task with timeout and cancellation

name: DeepStream execution
protocol_or_contract: GStreamer, CUDA, NVDEC, TensorRT, NVIDIA metadata
identity_and_policy: Mounted approved engine and coherent host-driver libraries
data: H.264 frames, tensors, detections, tracks
availability_and_recovery: No CPU inference fallback and no Triton server process

name: Media provider submission
identity_and_policy: Provider credential held only by media server
data: Bounded provider request and deletion request
availability_and_recovery: Submission binding commits before task detaches

name: Media terminal webhook
identity_and_policy: Provider signature and unique event validation
data: Terminal event, output references, usage facts
availability_and_recovery: Webhook-only completion; missing delivery is operational failure

name: Analytical execution
protocol_or_contract: Embedded DuckDB API and arbitrary SQL
identity_and_policy: Owner-derived workspace and locked engine settings
data: Queries, mutations, ingests, exports, spatial operations
availability_and_recovery: Read work may resume; uncertain mutation is never replayed

name: Map acquisition helper
protocol_or_contract: JSON subprocess contract and filesystem exchange
identity_and_policy: Registered source policy, bounded paths, network controls
data: OSM, GTFS, maritime, aviation, and authority acquisition products
availability_and_recovery: Acquisition tasks persist durable state and immutable release identities

name: Map routing toolchain
identity_and_policy: Container-local endpoints and governed active release
data: Routing tiles, route requests, matrices, reachable areas
availability_and_recovery: Active release dependencies are recorded with route products

name: Rerun viewer bridge
protocol_or_contract: MCP stdio child to Streamable HTTP parent
identity_and_policy: Gateway profile controls the external HTTP projection
data: Viewer MCP tools
availability_and_recovery: Bridge process owns child lifecycle

name: World recording publication
identity_and_policy: Internal recording identity
data: SUMO world frames
availability_and_recovery: Recording Hub never polls SUMO

name: SUMO control
identity_and_policy: Single serialized owner; not published to host
data: Simulation state, signals, vehicles, network actuation
availability_and_recovery: Uncertain mutating batch execution is interrupted-indeterminate

name: Telemetry export
identity_and_policy: Installation-selected exporter and SIEM credentials
data: Logs, traces, metrics, audit-compatible events
availability_and_recovery: Telemetry excludes tokens

name: Deployment control
protocol_or_contract: Docker Compose and OCI runtime APIs
identity_and_policy: Installation operator credentials and secret files
data: Images, networks, volumes, health checks, configuration
availability_and_recovery: Compose is the canonical local and single-host form

name: Kubernetes deployment control
identity_and_policy: Installation operator RBAC and existing Secrets
data: Workloads, Services, Ingress, NetworkPolicy, volumes, mTLS annotations
availability_and_recovery: Helm preserves the same service graph and explicit singleton resources

name: Offline transfer
protocol_or_contract: Verified tar and OCI image archives
identity_and_policy: SHA-256 checksums, resolved identities, SPDX SBOMs
data: Images, Compose, Helm, schemas, manifests, evidence
availability_and_recovery: Loader performs no network operation
